zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Molyneux of Melling於1232年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton22歲，母親Margaret Thorne20歲。他於大約1257年與Emma Donne of Utkinton在英國藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在英國藍卡爾梅林享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Molyneux of Melling于1232年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton22岁，母亲Margaret Thorne20岁。他于大约1257年与Emma Donne of Utkinton在英国藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1320年在英国藍卡爾梅林享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Molyneux of Melling was born in 1232, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Thorne, was 20. He married Emma Donne of Utkinton about 1257, in Sefton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1320, in Melling, Lancashire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Molyneux of Melling est né en 1232, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Thorne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Emma Donne of Utkinton environ 1257, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1320, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Molyneux of Melling 1232 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Thorne 20. Er hat um 1257 in Sefton, Lancashire, England Emma Donne of Utkinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Melling, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux of Melling è nato il nel 1232 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Thorne, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Emma Donne of Utkinton circa 1257, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1320, nel Melling, Lancashire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneux of Mellingが1232年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Molyneux Lord of Seftonは22歳，母Margaret Thorneは20歳であった。約1257年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでEmma Donne of Utkintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneux of Melling(이)가 1232년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Thorne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1257년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Emma Donne of Utkinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux of Melling nasceu em 1232, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Thorne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Donne of Utkinton aproximadamente 1257, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Molyneux of Melling родился в 1232 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Thorne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Donne of Utkinton около 1257 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Molyneux of Melling nació en 1232, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Molyneux Lord of Sefton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Thorne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Emma Donne of Utkinton aproximadamente 1257, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1320, en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
